name: Corn Madeleines
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Cayenne pepper; or to taste
1/2 cup Corn Kernels (drain well if using Canned)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
Lightly spray or grease a 12-cookie madeleine pan; dust with flour and knock out any excess.
Stir together the cornmeal, cayenne pepper, salt, and baking powder in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, dissolve the brown sugar in the milk. Add the eggs and butter to the milk mixture, stirring to mix.
Gradually add the milk mixture and corn kernels to the dry ingredients, stirring just until combined.
Use 1 slightly rounded tablespoon of batter for each corn madeleine.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the bottom of each cake is golden.
Repeat with remaining batter, lightly spraying and flour-dusting the pan for each batch.
(Makes about 3 dozen).
